prompt: Refine the fetal posture and contour in the source image using the fetal template from the reference scan, aligning anatomical orientation while maintaining scan realism.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Modify the fetal posture and contour in image 1 to align with the anatomical structure and orientation observed in image 2. Ensure the final edited image retains the photorealistic quality and characteristics of a medical scan.
objects: Fetus (with anatomical structure and orientation matching image 2)
